TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Philippe of Belgium == ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 4, Philippe of Belgium, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1960) mrhuw Belguim ta' misuw hya' ga Philippe of Belgium, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2313 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == pńßilippe o* ő≤el…£ium == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, pńßilippe o* ő≤el…£ium, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤el…£uim ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a pńßilippe o* ő≤el…£ium, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Philippe of Belgium == ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 4, Philippe of Belgium, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1960) mrhuw Belguim ta' misuw hya' ga Philippe of Belgium, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2313 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == pńßilippe o* ő≤el…£ium == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, pńßilippe o* ő≤el…£ium, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤el…£uim ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a pńßilippe o* ő≤el…£ium, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
